'''Colony Two''' was a colony city on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. It was located on the shore of the oceanic [[Zoma Gawanga]], north of [[Peace City|Colony One]] and [[Colony Three]].

*''[[The Paradise Snare]]''
